name: teamId
label: Team
help: Select a team from your Renderbase account

name: workspaceId
label: Workspace
help: Select a workspace within the selected team

name: templateId
label: Template
help: Select a template from the selected workspace

name: format
label: Output Format
help: Choose the output format for all documents in this batch

name: documents
label: Documents

spec.name: variables
spec.label: Template Variables
spec.help: Variables for this document (fields loaded from template)

spec.name: fileName
spec.label: File Name
spec.help: Optional custom file name for this document

help: List of documents to generate. Each document has its own variables and optional file name.

name: waitForCompletion
label: Wait for Completion
help: Wait for all documents to be generated. For large batches, disable this and use the Batch Completed trigger.
